Frequently Asked Questions

How do I create a new project?

Click the 'Add Project' button on the dashboard to create a new project.

Can I invite team members?

Yes, go to the Team page and click 'Add Member' to invite new team members.

How do I track time on tasks?

Use the Time Tracker widget on the dashboard to start tracking time for your tasks.

Can I export my data?

Yes, you can export your data from the Settings page under Data Management.
